description: Priority areas for near-real-time monitoring: where we concentrate live AIS capture and where the on-demand Sentinel-1 SAR engine looks for dark vessels. bbox is [lon_min, lat_min, lon_max, lat_max] in WGS84 (same order as the SAR script's --bbox and the GeoJSON convention).

areas.name: Galapagos Marine Reserve and EEZ edge
Argentine shelf edge (Blue Hole, squid jigger fleet)
West Africa EEZs (Guinea, Sierra Leone, Liberia)
